---
title: "Class Presentation"
author: "Pietro Zecca"
format: beamer
---



```{r}
# libraries
library(tidyverse)

# data
load('SDI.RData')

# limit to CORDOBA, ARG
df <-
  data_sdi%>%
  filter(region_name == 'CENTRO')

```

# analysis slide

```{r}
# graph dem by region over time

df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x= year, y = SUR_index_sub_exe, color = state_name))+
  geom_line()+
  theme_classic()

```
